species: Neurexins are synaptic adhesion molecules best characterized in neurons...
tissue: human fetal glial cells (SVG p12 cells)
cell_type: emerging evidence indicating they are also abundantly expressed by astrocytes.
sample_source: we employed a proximity labeling strategy in cultured human fetal glial cells (SVG p12 cells).
cell_line: we expressed our APEX2 fusion proteins for proximity labeling in the fetal astroglial cell line SVG p12.
